title: Auto move task projects linked to portfolio
excerpt: When I create a item in the portfolio it is great that an automation creates an associated task board to manage the project. However, the task board just appears at the bottom of the list and has to be moved manually to …

posts.author: Caroline24 (Caroline Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml: When I create a item in the portfolio it is great that an automation creates an associated task board to manage the project. However, the task board just appears at the bottom of the list and has to be moved manually to the task board folder. It would be most useful if the automation could move this automatically to the Task Boards folder.
